# The Ring of Power

> [!abstract] ⚪ Event · Cost: **0** · Neutral

*Master.*

---

**Action**: Exhaust The One Ring and raise your threat by 1 to ready the hero with The One Ring Attached. That hero gets +1 WP, +1 ATK, and +1 DEF until the end of the phase.
